entry.title: GEOEO - I/B Oden position
entry.content:
Back to Pages

GEOEO - North of Greenland 2024

About the expedition at the Swedish Polar Research Secretariat About the expedition at Stockholm University

The position of I/B Oden

Real-time map via Arctic Marine Solutions Map with sea ice concentration via Stockholm University (does not plot properly in Firefox)

entry.title: Ice motion 2014
entry.content:
Back to Pages

Ice motion 2014 Weekly ice motion in 2014 based on version 4 of the Polar Pathfinder Daily 25 km EASE-Grid Sea Ice Motion Vectors (Tschudi et al., 2019).

Tschudi, M., Meier, W. N., Stewart, J. S., Fowler, C., & Maslanik, J. (2019). Polar Pathfinder Daily 25 km EASE-Grid Sea Ice Motion Vectors, Version 4. Boulder, Colorado USA. NASA National Snow and Ice Data Center Distributed Active Archive Center, [Dataset: icemotion_weekly_nh_25km 1979-2019]. https://doi.org/10.5067/INAWUWO7QH7B

entry.title: Lena River discharge 1936-2020
entry.content:
Back to Pages

Lena River discharge 1936-2020 Discharge data from Kyusyur station (Lena River) from 1936 to 2020. Colors from blue to red indicate the year from 1936 to 2020. The blue and black thick solid lines show the year 2011 and 2014, respectively, and the black thick dashed shows the mean of the period from 1936 to 2020. The figure is based on Juhls et al. (2020). Discharge data is from The Arctic Great Rivers Observatory.

Juhls, B., Stedmon, C. A., Morgenstern, A., Meyer, H., Hölemann, J., Heim, B., Povazhnyi, V., & Overduin, P. P. (2020). Identifying Drivers of Seasonality in Lena River Biogeochemistry and Dissolved Organic Matter Fluxes. Frontiers in Environmental Science, 8(May), 1–15. https://doi.org/10.3389/fenvs.2020.00053
